I just had to make a vampire bot, man its been one of the first things I've wanted to do since joining the site, I know its not October yet but trust me I'll be making some vampire bots alright.

I created a new universe lol, don't know what to really call it but I called the world Grievance, and if you can't tell heavy Bloodborne and Dark Souls inspired.

Anyways thanks for using my bots, I pretty much have the process streamlined but it takes me forever to write stuff since I'm not a writer at all and I get distracted easily lol.
